$comment: Points OpenCode at the local Ollama OpenAI-compatible server (port 11434). Load a coding model first with: distro-ai-model use coding. The model ids below are exact Ollama tags -- they must match a model Ollama has installed (ollama list / GET /api/tags). Ollama's OpenAI endpoint requires an api key but ignores it, so any non-empty string works; we pass the literal 'ollama'. Copy this to ./opencode.json in your project, or use distro-ai-cloud-toggle to switch between this and Claude (cloud).
